_comment_invite_members: invite_members controls whether org members are invited to the target org.
true  — ACTIVE MIGRATION / DISASTER RECOVERY: members are invited and
issue assignees are applied. Use this when people need to start
working in the target org immediately.
false — BACKUP / READ-ONLY MIRROR: no invitations are sent, no issue
assignees are set, and team member lists are not synced.
Team structures and repo permissions are still mirrored so the
org is fully ready to flip to DR mode at any time.
